applicability_notes: Exact GELU (erf-based). Supports in-place via output_tensor=input (seen in mlp_spatial/mlp_prompt call sites). Frequently follows ttnn.linear/matmul+bias; note one call site comments that fusing the activation into the matmul gave worse PCC, so a standalone ttnn.gelu after linear is a valid replacement for torch linear->gelu subsequences.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.gelu(x, fast_and_approximate_mode=False)

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); tt_result = ttnn.gelu(tt_in)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: MLP intermediate [batch, seq, 4*hidden] from wi linear
placement_observations.source: model MLP: x = ttnn.linear(x, self.w1, ..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); x = ttnn.gelu(x)
ttnn.gelu(intermediate, memory_config=self.config.activation_memcfg, fast_and_approximate_mode=False) following ttnn.linear with program_config=wi_prg_config; intermediate deallocated after

memory_config.shard_spec_template: sharded (conv output sharding); converted via ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved immediately after gelu

placement_observations.source: input_embeds = ttnn.gelu(input_embeds); input_embeds = ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(input_embeds) after ttnn.conv1d

placement_observations.size_descriptor: FF1 output in sharded BERT-style encoder
placement_observations.source: if use_sharded: x = ttnn.to_memory_config(x, self.interleaved_mem_config) before x = ttnn.gelu(x) — gelu run on interleaved, resharded afterwards via create_sharded_memory_config
ttnn.gelu(mlp_spatial, output_tensor=mlp_spatial, fast_and_approximate_mode=False) — in-place to avoid OOM (adjacent comment notes OOM and that fusing into matmul hurts PCC)
